docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,785.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CLEVELAND JR. BAKER, 2ND ADDRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
